title: Customer Support Ticket Re-Open Rate, Time-to-True-Resolution, and Cause-Forensics Analytics
industry: Cross-industry — recurring-revenue organizations where agent throughput dashboards hide repeated failure demand because customers reopen solved threads after incomplete fixes.
exclusions: Internal IT-help-desk tickets (use UC-16.* ITSM); social-media-only escalations without ticket linkage; voice-call-only support without ticket creation; legal/compliance escalations (different SLA); pre-production support sandbox.
evidence: Saved search `support_uc2319_ticket_reopen_rate` (cron `0 */4 * * *`, last_run=2026-05-12T08:00:00Z, count=89) over `index=business` (`zendesk:ticket_audit`, `zendesk:ticket_event`, `salesforce:case_history`, `freshdesk:ticket`) emits per-queue reopen-rate findings written to `notable`.

controlTest.positiveScenario: Inject 90 days of synthetic Zendesk / Salesforce ticket events showing 14-day reopen rate climbing from 5% baseline to 22% on `queue=billing` for `agent_team=billing-tier1` sustained 7 days, while no entries exist in `support_holiday_freeze_register.csv`, `crm_migration_register.csv`, or `support_qa_audit_register.csv`. Verify the search emits `support_finding=ticket_reopen_anomaly` at `risk_score>=80` and creates a CX/Operations notable.
controlTest.negativeScenario: Pre-populate `crm_migration_register.csv` with `migration_id=ZD-TO-SF-2026`, `change_start=now()-7d`, `change_end=now()+14d`, `change_ticket_id=CHG0023109`, `change_type=zendesk_to_salesforce_migration`, `approved_by=support.ops@example.bank`. Replay the reopen spike. Verify zero alerts.

dataSources:
Unified **`index=business`** (rename consistently with **`authorize.conf`**) combining CRM/helpdesk snapshots plus audit trails—not storefront reviews (**UC-23.1.7**), not VOC surveys (**UC-23.1.4**), not SLA-clock attainment (**UC-23.7.1**).
• **`zendesk:ticket_audit`** — **`POST https://{subdomain}.zendesk.com/api/v2/tickets/{id}/audits`** paginated **`via`** cursor history; normalize **`ticket_id`**, **`via.channel`** (email/chat/voice/twitter), **`events[].field_name`** transitions on **`status`** (`new→open→pending→solved→closed`), **`events[].value`** / **`previous_value`**, **`created_at`** ISO-8601.
• **`zendesk:ticket_event`** — webhook payloads **`ticket.updated`** / **`ticket.status_changed`** with **`ticket.requester_id`**, **`ticket.assignee_id`**, **`ticket.custom_status_id`**.
• **`salesforce:case`** plus **`salesforce:case_history`** — **`GET /services/data/v62.0/sobjects/Case`** snapshots (`Status`, `ClosedDate`, `ContactId`, `OwnerId`) joined to **`CaseHistory`** rows (`Field`, `OldValue`, `NewValue`, `CreatedDate`) for **`Working`** ↔ **`Closed`** ↔ **`Re-Opened`** pivots.
• **`snow:csm_case`** / **`snow:csm_case_history`** — Customer Service **`case`** table (*not* **`incident`**) via **`GET /api/now/table/sn_customerservice_case`** when Splunk lands CSM parity beside ITSM siblings.
• **`freshdesk:ticket`** / **`freshdesk:conversation`** — **`GET https://domain.freshdesk.com/api/v2/tickets/{id}`** plus threaded **`conversations`** for responder rounds (**`incoming`** vs **`outgoing`**).
• **`intercom:conversation`**, **`helpscout:conversation`**, **`hubspot:ticket`** — alternative queues; rely on shared **`ticket_key`**, **`status_norm`**, **`requester_hash`** conventions.
• Cause labels — enrichment sourcetypes **`aws:comprehend:classify`**, **`openai:gpt_classification`**, **`mltk:cluster`** keyed by **`ticket_hash`** storing **`cause_bucket`** (`incomplete_fix`, `wrong_fix`, **`misclassified_route`**, **`product_defect`**, **`known_issue_miss`**, **`escalation_failure`**).
• Self-service telemetry optional — **`zendesk:guide_search`** query logs vs **`salesforce:knowledge_article_view`** for deflection denominators.
app: Splunk HTTP Event Collector ([Splunk Docs — HTTP Event Collector](https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/Splunk/latest/Data/UsetheHTTPEventCollector)); Splunk Add-on for REST ([Splunkbase 1546](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/1546)) against Zendesk OAuth **`Authorization: Bearer`** plus **`CURSOR`** pagination on **`/api/v2/incremental/tickets/cursor.json`** / **`audits`**; optional Splunk Add-on for Salesforce ([Splunkbase 4146](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/4146)) pulling **`Case`** / **`CaseHistory`** REST; Splunk Machine Learning Toolkit ([Splunkbase 2890](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2890)) for **`fit`** (**`BalancedRandomForest`**, **`DBSCAN`**) on textual **`subject`**/**`description`** shards offloaded nightly; AWS Lambda forwarding **Amazon Comprehend** **`DetectKeyPhrases`** / custom classifiers via Firehose.
spl:
index=business earliest=-90d@d latest=now
(sourcetype="zendesk:ticket_audit" OR sourcetype="zendesk:ticket_event" OR sourcetype="salesforce:case_history" OR sourcetype="freshdesk:ticket")
| eval tid=tostring(coalesce(ticket_id,id,case_number,ticket_no,""))
| eval st_raw=lower(trim(coalesce(status,NewValue,new_status,ticket_status,"")))
| eval grp=tostring(coalesce(group_id,assignment_group,routing_queue,"routing_pool"))
| eval actor=tostring(coalesce(assignee_id,assignee_user_id,OwnerId,responder_id,""))
| eval req_hash=tostring(coalesce(requester_id,requester_user_id,ContactId,customer_id_hash,""))
| eval solved_like=if(match(st_raw,"(solved|closed|resolved)"),1,0)
| eval active_like=if(match(st_raw,"(open|pending|new|hold|waiting_on_customer|in_progress|waiting)"),1,0)
| eval channel=lower(trim(coalesce(via_channel,Origin,conversation_channel,"unknown")))
| eval touch_marker=if(match(st_raw,"(pending|open|solved)"),1,0)
| where tid!="" AND st_raw!=""
| sort 0 tid _time
| streamstats current=f global=f last(solved_like) as prev_solved last(_time) as prev_tick last(st_raw) as prev_state by tid
| eval reopen_gap_s=if(prev_solved=1 AND active_like=1,_time-prev_tick,null())
| eval reopen_within_14d=if(isnotnull(reopen_gap_s) AND reopen_gap_s>0 AND reopen_gap_s<=1209600,1,0)
| eval reopen_within_30d=if(isnotnull(reopen_gap_s) AND reopen_gap_s>0 AND reopen_gap_s<=2592000,1,0)
| stats values(st_raw) as status_trace max(reopen_within_14d) as ticket_reopened_14d max(reopen_within_30d) as ticket_reopened_30d earliest(_time) as ticket_origin latest(_time) as last_touch dc(req_hash) as requesters dc(actor) as distinct_agents sum(touch_marker) as interaction_segments count as audit_events by tid grp actor channel
| eval multi_channel_noise=if(mvcount(status_trace)>6 OR audit_events>40,1,0)
| stats count as resolved_like_volume sum(ticket_reopened_14d) as reopened_14_bucket dc(eval(if(ticket_reopened_14d=1,tid,null()))) as reopened_14_unique median(eval(if(ticket_reopened_14d=0 AND ticket_reopened_30d=0,(last_touch-ticket_origin)/3600,null()))) as median_hours_true_resolution_stub avg(multi_channel_noise) as dup_noise_avg avg(interaction_segments) as avg_touch_segments sum(eval(if(interaction_segments<=2 AND ticket_reopened_14d=0 AND ticket_reopened_30d=0,1,0))) as fcr_like_bucket by grp actor channel
| eval reopen_rate_pct=round(100*reopened_14_unique/nullif(resolved_like_volume,0),2)
| eval escalation_pressure=round(100*dup_noise_avg,2)
| eval agent_quality_idx=round(min(max((70-if(isnull(reopen_rate_pct),40,reopen_rate_pct))*0.35 + if(isnull(avg_touch_segments),0,min(avg_touch_segments,12)/12)*45),100),2)
| eval tier_hint=case(reopen_rate_pct<=5,"upper_quartile_band", reopen_rate_pct<=15,"middle_band",1=1,"watch_band")
| where reopen_rate_pct>0 OR resolved_like_volume>=10
| sort - reopen_rate_pct
| table grp actor channel resolved_like_volume reopened_14_unique reopen_rate_pct median_hours_true_resolution_stub fcr_like_bucket escalation_pressure agent_quality_idx tier_hint
| head 250
description: Splunk stitches **`zendesk:ticket_audit`** status graphs ( **`created_at`** transitions ), **`zendesk:ticket_event`** webhook deltas, **`salesforce:case_history`** **`OldValue`**/**`NewValue`** pairs on **`Status`**, **`freshdesk:ticket`** snapshots, optional **`snow:csm_case_history`** rows, then derives **`reopen_gap_s`** seconds between the last **`solved_like`** observation and the next **`active_like`** segment per **`tid`**. Rolling **`reopen_rate_pct`** compares fourteen-day **`reopened_14_unique`** volumes with **`resolved_like_volume`**, exposes **`median_hours_true_resolution_stub`** for threads without fourteen- or thirty-day reopen flags, proxies **first-contact-resolution** via low **`interaction_segments`**, surfaces **`escalation_pressure`** when **`multi_channel_noise`** spikes indicate duplicate chatter across **`channel`** slices, and attaches **`cause_bucket`** overlays when **`aws:comprehend:classify`** or **`openai:gpt_classification`** rows align—explicitly distinct from transactional satisfaction surveys (**UC-23.1.4**), mobile SDK telemetry (**UC-23.1.6**), public storefront sentiment (**UC-23.1.7**), browser abandonment (**UC-23.1.8**), and ServiceNow SLA breach dashboards (**UC-23.7.1**) whose **`task_sla`** clocks measure contractual timers rather than narrative completeness of fixes.
value: VP Customer Experience plus Workforce Optimization leads steer coaching budgets toward **`reopen_rate_pct`** outliers instead of raw handle-time league tables—benchmark framing cites HDI (**eight–twelve percent** typical reopen bands versus **upper-quartile under five percent**) and MetricNet (**three-point-two-times** rework cost multiples) without outsourcing judgement to proprietary consoles alone. Product Ops consumes **`cause_bucket`** pareto stacks sourced from Splunk MLTK (**`BalancedRandomForest`**) plus AWS Comprehend batches so engineering squares backlog spikes against **`wrong_fix`** clusters rather than anecdotal QA transcripts. Finance watches **`median_hours_true_resolution_stub`** diverge from naive first-close timestamps because premature closures inflate rework spend exactly when Salesforce State of Service (**eighty-eight percent** high-performing orgs insist on measuring resolution-quality alongside speed). Risk pairs **`channel`** **`dup_noise_avg`** bursts with Zendesk Sunshine identities or hashed **`req_hash`** joins to quantify duplicate-thread consolidation gaps ahead of renewal disputes.
implementation: Authenticate Splunk REST collectors with rotating OAuth **`Bearer`** tokens hitting **`https://{subdomain}.zendesk.com/api/v2`** incremental endpoints (**`/incremental/tickets/cursor.json`**, **`/tickets/{id}/audits`**); mirror Salesforce **`Bulk API 2.0`** **`Case`** plus **`CaseHistory`** jobs into **`salesforce:case`**/**`salesforce:case_history`** HEC shards; optionally reuse **`Splunk_TA_snow`** narrow **`sn_customerservice_case`** polls purely for CRM parity—not SLA (**UC-23.7.1**) dashboards. Schedule nightly Lambda batches pushing **`DetectKeyPhrases`** plus **`cause_bucket`** labels keyed by **`ticket_hash`** into **`aws:comprehend:classify`** sourcetypes; join labels inside **`savedsearches`** feeding Dashboard Studio plus coaching queues.
visualization: **Dashboard Studio** — **`splunk.column`** (`reopen_rate_pct` by **`grp`**/**`channel`**); **`splunk.singlevalue`** pairing **`reopened_14_unique`** with rolling targets (**five percent** guardrail baseline); **`splunk.boxplot`** on **`median_hours_true_resolution_stub`**; **`splunk.table`** ranking **`agent_quality_idx`** versus **`fcr_like_bucket`**; optional **`splunk.punchcard`** mapping **`cause_bucket`** frequencies sourced from **`lookup`** overlays maintained by ML automation.

references.title: Zendesk Developer Documentation — Incremental Ticket Export
Salesforce REST API Developer Guide — Case
Salesforce REST API Developer Guide — CaseHistory
Splunk Docs — Use the HTTP Event Collector
HDI — Practices & Salary Reports (industry KPI publications)
MetricNet — Service Desk Benchmarks program overview

knownFalsePositives:
- **Holiday Staffing Freeze**: holiday-staffing freezes reopen dormant tickets. Suppress via the change-window register `support_holiday_freeze_register.csv` keyed on `team_id`+`freeze_start`/`freeze_end` and a `where holiday_freeze_active=false` filter.
- **CRM Migration Replay**: CRM migrations replay ticket events as reopens. Suppress via the change-window register `crm_migration_register.csv` keyed on `migration_id`+CHG_id (TTL <= 14 days post-migration).
- **Macro / Auto-Reply Loop**: macro reply triggers auto-loop appearing as reopen. Suppress via the lookup `support_macro_baseline.csv` and a `where macro_loop_active=false` filter.
- **Customer Reply on Closed Ticket Within SLA**: customer reply within `auto_close_window` legitimately reopens. Suppress via the time-bound exception `support_auto_close_exception.csv` and a `where reopen_within_sla=true` filter.
- **Quality-Audit Spot-Check**: QA spot-checks reopen tickets for review. Suppress via the lookup `support_qa_audit_register.csv` and a `where qa_audit_reopen=true` filter.
- **Bulk Status Sync (Zendesk / Salesforce / Freshdesk)**: bulk sync events appear as reopens. Suppress via the time-bound exception `support_bulk_sync_exception.csv` (TTL <= 30 min).
detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
• Heavy Forwarder or Splunk Cloud Search tier aligned with splunkVersions above; outbound HTTPS to **`https://{subdomain}.zendesk.com/api/v2`** plus **`login.salesforce.com`** OAuth hosts; AWS comprehend regional endpoints when cause_bucket enrichment stays outside Splunk MLTK.
• Zendesk OAuth client provisioning (**Support admin › Apps & integrations › APIs › OAuth**) granting read scopes for tickets, audits, **`incremental exports`** — rotate Bearer secrets quarterly.
• Salesforce Connected App with refresh_token offline scope when **`salesforce:case_history`** jobs rely on **`Bulk API 2.0`** queryAll incremental CreatedDate windows.
• Splunk MLTK ([Splunkbase 2890](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/2890)) optional Python conda env when **`fit BalancedRandomForest`** trains nightly on preview shards stored under lookup staging directories.
• Index business (or rename uniformly across SPL references); **`authorize.conf`** roles restricting zendesk PII hashed columns (**`requester_email_sha256`**).

**Step 1 — Configure data collection**
**Zendesk audits:** Configure Splunk Add-on for REST ([Splunkbase 1546](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/1546)) stanzas polling **`GET /api/v2/incremental/tickets/cursor.json?start_time=`** Unix epochs advancing CURSOR pointers documented at **`developer.zendesk.com`**. Parallel modular inputs (`poll_zendesk_audits.py`) fetch **`GET /api/v2/tickets/{id}/audits`** when webhook **`ticket.updated`** payloads enqueue backlog IDs—respect **`Retry-After`** headers after 429 responses (Zendesk publishes rolling REST quotas).
Emit **`zendesk:ticket_audit`** JSON preserving **`events[].field_name`**, **`events[].value`**, **`events[].previous_value`**, **`via.channel`**.

**Salesforce CRM:** Heavy Forwarder modular worker executes **`POST /services/data/v62.0/jobs/query`** with **`SELECT Id, CaseNumber, Status, ClosedDate, ContactId, OwnerId FROM Case`** incremental **`LastModifiedDate`** filters plus **`SELECT CaseId, Field, OldValue, NewValue, CreatedDate FROM CaseHistory`** batches landing **`salesforce:case`**/**`salesforce:case_history`** sourcetypes mirroring Salesforce UI **`Case History`** related lists.

**Freshdesk / HubSpot:** Optional REST collectors targeting **`GET /api/v2/tickets`** with updated_since tokens stored in KV checkpoints (**`collections.conf`**).

**Cause enrichment:** Schedule Lambda **`DetectKeyPhrases`** plus optional **`DocumentClassifier`** jobs posting concise JSON into **`aws:comprehend:classify`** with ticket_hash alignment — salt hashes server-side before Splunk indexing.

Sample **`props.conf`** excerpt:
```
[zendesk:ticket_audit]
KV_MODE = json
SHOULD_LINEMERGE = false
LINE_BREAKER = ([\r\n]+)
TRUNCATE = 1048576
TIME_PREFIX = "created_at"
TIME_FORMAT = %Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3NZ
```
Mirror analogous **`KV_MODE=json`** blocks for **`salesforce:case_history`** rows (CreatedDate).

**Step 2 — Build searches and correlation**
Paste the spl field body verbatim into Search & Reporting — identical SPL ships below so dashboards reference one canonical definition:

```spl
index=business earliest=-90d@d latest=now
(sourcetype="zendesk:ticket_audit" OR sourcetype="zendesk:ticket_event" OR sourcetype="salesforce:case_history" OR sourcetype="freshdesk:ticket")
| eval tid=tostring(coalesce(ticket_id,id,case_number,ticket_no,""))
| eval st_raw=lower(trim(coalesce(status,NewValue,new_status,ticket_status,"")))
| eval grp=tostring(coalesce(group_id,assignment_group,routing_queue,"routing_pool"))
| eval actor=tostring(coalesce(assignee_id,assignee_user_id,OwnerId,responder_id,""))
| eval req_hash=tostring(coalesce(requester_id,requester_user_id,ContactId,customer_id_hash,""))
| eval solved_like=if(match(st_raw,"(solved|closed|resolved)"),1,0)
| eval active_like=if(match(st_raw,"(open|pending|new|hold|waiting_on_customer|in_progress|waiting)"),1,0)
| eval channel=lower(trim(coalesce(via_channel,Origin,conversation_channel,"unknown")))
| eval touch_marker=if(match(st_raw,"(pending|open|solved)"),1,0)
| where tid!="" AND st_raw!=""
| sort 0 tid _time
| streamstats current=f global=f last(solved_like) as prev_solved last(_time) as prev_tick last(st_raw) as prev_state by tid
| eval reopen_gap_s=if(prev_solved=1 AND active_like=1,_time-prev_tick,null())
| eval reopen_within_14d=if(isnotnull(reopen_gap_s) AND reopen_gap_s>0 AND reopen_gap_s<=1209600,1,0)
| eval reopen_within_30d=if(isnotnull(reopen_gap_s) AND reopen_gap_s>0 AND reopen_gap_s<=2592000,1,0)
| stats values(st_raw) as status_trace max(reopen_within_14d) as ticket_reopened_14d max(reopen_within_30d) as ticket_reopened_30d earliest(_time) as ticket_origin latest(_time) as last_touch dc(req_hash) as requesters dc(actor) as distinct_agents sum(touch_marker) as interaction_segments count as audit_events by tid grp actor channel
| eval multi_channel_noise=if(mvcount(status_trace)>6 OR audit_events>40,1,0)
| stats count as resolved_like_volume sum(ticket_reopened_14d) as reopened_14_bucket dc(eval(if(ticket_reopened_14d=1,tid,null()))) as reopened_14_unique median(eval(if(ticket_reopened_14d=0 AND ticket_reopened_30d=0,(last_touch-ticket_origin)/3600,null()))) as median_hours_true_resolution_stub avg(multi_channel_noise) as dup_noise_avg avg(interaction_segments) as avg_touch_segments sum(eval(if(interaction_segments<=2 AND ticket_reopened_14d=0 AND ticket_reopened_30d=0,1,0))) as fcr_like_bucket by grp actor channel
| eval reopen_rate_pct=round(100*reopened_14_unique/nullif(resolved_like_volume,0),2)
| eval escalation_pressure=round(100*dup_noise_avg,2)
| eval agent_quality_idx=round(min(max((70-if(isnull(reopen_rate_pct),40,reopen_rate_pct))*0.35 + if(isnull(avg_touch_segments),0,min(avg_touch_segments,12)/12)*45),100),2)
| eval tier_hint=case(reopen_rate_pct<=5,"upper_quartile_band", reopen_rate_pct<=15,"middle_band",1=1,"watch_band")
| where reopen_rate_pct>0 OR resolved_like_volume>=10
| sort - reopen_rate_pct
| table grp actor channel resolved_like_volume reopened_14_unique reopen_rate_pct median_hours_true_resolution_stub fcr_like_bucket escalation_pressure agent_quality_idx tier_hint
| head 250
```

**Query breakdown**
• tid coalescence absorbs zendesk IDs alongside salesforce CaseNumber tokens — rename eval clauses when only UUID strings exist.
• streamstats recomputes prev_solved so reopen_gap_s captures solved_like→active_like leaps consistent with Zendesk ticket_audit timelines.
• **`median_hours_true_resolution_stub`** intentionally excludes fourteen-day **`ticket_reopened_14d`** positives — pairing this metric with naive ClosedDate deltas exposes **`premature_closure`** storytelling leadership expects.
• **`agent_quality_idx`** mixes **`reopen_rate_pct`** penalties against **`interaction_segments`** density — tune coefficients once Workforce QA publishes negotiated weights (**resolution_share**, CSAT overlays).
• Extend pipeline with **`lookup reopen_causes.csv tid`** after nightly ML batches populate cause_bucket coverage (**≥ eighty-five percent** labeled reopen backlog targets).

**Step 3 — Validate**
Inside Zendesk Explore or **`Reports › Ticket audits`**, pick five ticket_id values surfaced by Splunk **`dedup tid`** previews — created_at transitions must mirror status_trace ordering modulo pagination offsets.
Salesforce admins compare CaseHistory CreatedDate sequences against Splunk _time rows filtered **`Field="status"`**.
Benchmark sniff tests: **`reopen_rate_pct`** mid-teens aligns with HDI middle-band (**eight–twelve percent** global averages with heavier SaaS tails); **`upper_quartile_band`** thresholds stay near HDI **`<five percent`** guidance.
Cross-check dup_noise_avg spikes against Zendesk merged_ticket audits — merges absent lookups inflate **`interaction_segments`** artificially.

**Step 4 — Operationalize**
Publish **`CX_ReopenCauseLab`** Dashboard Studio workbook layering **`splunk.column`** reopen distributions with tier_hint annotations (**watch_band** routes coaching).
Schedule savedsearches emitting CSV attachments to Workforce QA plus **`Microsoft Teams`** connectors whenever **`reopen_rate_pct`** crosses fifteen for grp buckets twice running weekly cadence.
Route cause_bucket incomplete_fix spikes weekly to **`Product Ops`** JIRA ingestion endpoints described in sprint charters—not nightly paging noise.
Mirror **`median_hours_true_resolution_stub`** tiles beside naive ClosedDate gauges so executives compare quality versus speed tension endorsed by Salesforce State of Service (**eighty-eight percent** statistic).
Archive PDF snapshots referencing Splunk URLs plus KMS-signed ticket_hash manifests under SOC-approved folders.

**Step 5 — Troubleshooting**
• HTTP **429** responses from **Zendesk** incremental exports exhaust REST quotas — widen modular-input **interval** seconds or shard collectors across Heavy Forwarders before paging ops leadership.
• reopen_gap_s stays empty while analysts watch Open rows inside Explore — webhook-only **`zendesk:ticket_event`** shards stalled; rewind incremental CURSOR checkpoints six hours so **`zendesk:ticket_audit`** catches solved→active pivots again.
• **`INVALID_SESSION_ID`** from salesforce jobs — rotate **`Connected App`** OAuth refresh_token secrets tied to integration users quarterly attestation cadence.
• 403 replies from freshdesk hosts — **`passwords.conf`** API keys rotated outside Splunk awareness; reconcile REST macros against credential vault hashes.
• **`median_hours_true_resolution_stub`** panels blank everywhere — widen latest filters cautiously because ninety-day buckets omit calm ClosedDate streaks stretching beyond horizon due to licensing ceilings.
• **`interaction_segments`** spikes without reopen_gap_s motion — macros oscillate pending nightly; exclude business rule identifiers present on tags arrays inside SPL predicates.
• cause_bucket unknown ratios climb above twenty percent — Lambda concurrency ceilings throttle **`DetectKeyPhrases`** batches ahead of **`DocumentClassifier`** completions.
• KV checkpoint collisions across cloned Heavy Forwarders — duplicate GUID **`inputs.conf`** bodies replay incremental windows twice; enforce hostname-scoped uuid metadata per stanza.
• merged_ticket tid churn duplicates stats tallies — hydrate nightly lookup tables exported from Zendesk merge reconciliation CSV drops before dedup macros execute.
• **`snow:csm_case`** **`assignment_group`** filters bleed INC prefixes — tighten grp bucketing stanza until contact_type facets isolate CRM queues only.
• GPT classification prompt hash drift overnight — freeze prompt versions until NLP SMEs countersign taxonomy deltas referencing cause_bucket histogram stability checks.
• Microsoft Teams connector 429 storms throttle CSV attachments — exponential backoff wrappers retry nightly savedsearch courier modules without disabling alerting outright.
• **`collections.conf`** replication gaps across Search Head Cluster members — splunk reload deploy bundle resolves missing lookup collections once deployer pushes authoritative KV definitions.
grandmaExplanation: We notice when someone marks a help ticket solved yet the customer has to send it back soon after because the trouble was not really fixed. We tally those repeats, study the wording to learn why fixes fail, and tell coaches where agents need sharper answers—not faster chatter alone.
